channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Allie Eklund Responds to Steven McBee Jr.'s Infidelity Claims After Stagecoach
item.description: Steven McBee Jr. publicly alleged that his girlfriend Allie Eklund was unfaithful during Stagecoach Festival on April 27. Eklund subsequently denied the claim.

item.title: Harry Styles and Zoë Kravitz Reportedly Engaged After Eight Months Together
item.description: The couple first drew public attention in August 2025 and are now said to be engaged, according to a source.

item.title: Sydney Sweeney Makes Surprise Appearance at Stagecoach 2026
item.description: The Euphoria actress joined Diplo on stage during his HonkyTonk set at the 2026 Stagecoach Festival in a surprise performance.

item.title: Presidential Succession Explained: Who Is in Line After Trump
item.description: Following an alleged attack targeting the president and Cabinet at the White House Correspondents' Dinner on April 25, a look at the 18-person line of succession.
